home.hero_subtitle: IJF-compliant draws, live results, rankings — all on one platform.
home.features_subtitle: From organizing a tournament to live broadcasting — everything in one place.
home.feature_bracket_desc: SE, Round-Robin or mixed format with a single button.
home.feature_live_desc: WebSocket — results update instantly across all devices.
home.feature_ratings_desc: IJF-style points system: automatic calculation between tournaments.
home.feature_tatami_desc: Mobile panel for judges: Ippon, Waza-ari, Shido, osaekomi timer.
home.feature_protocol_desc: Tournament results, medal table — to PDF in one click.
home.feature_pwa_desc: Works without internet — built on PWA technology.
home.clubs_subtitle: Clubs and academies leading the ratings.
home.rankings_subtitle: Current rating table by weight category.
home.tournaments_subtitle: Tournaments with open registration or in LIVE status.
home.partners_subtitle: Federations and clubs using the platform.
home.cta_subtitle: Registration is free. First tournament in minutes.
home.no_upcoming_tournament_hint: When a tournament is added, the name, date, venue, start time and registration button will appear here.
home.clubs_empty: Clubs will appear here once they are added to the system.
home.ratings_empty: No athletes in the rankings yet. Points will appear after competitions are completed.
home.tournaments_empty: No tournaments yet. As soon as an admin adds a new tournament, it will appear here immediately.
home.clubs_athletes_desc: Clubs, athletes and rankings are loaded from real system data.
home.protocol_desc: Any spectator can view match results without registration.
home.protocol_ready_desc: Bracket, places, rating points and PDF are calculated automatically
home.calendar_desc: Teams submit entries, participants are split into categories, and live brackets update as competitions start.
home.live_center_title: Tatami, bracket and protocol on one screen
home.live_center_desc: International-standard control center: current match on each tatami, live bracket status and official documents.
home.entry_title: Register your team and add participants by category
home.entry_desc: The coach selects the competition, splits athletes by weight and age category; once the admin approves the entry, the bracket is built.
home.step_tournament_desc: Date, city and number of tatami are selected.
home.step_approve_desc: Admin reviews the entry and sends it to the bracket.
home.technique_desc: KYU videos and belt path in one place: athlete picks level, watches technique.
home.entry_feat_1: Team and club data is saved
home.belt_desc: From white belt to black — this journey is built of discipline, patience, and victories. Judo Arena tracks this path through the rankings.
home.ippon_desc: Result recorded in real time. Ippon, Waza-ari, Shido — Judo Arena tracks every second of the match.
home.particles_hint: Move your mouse — scatter the particles

about.title: About the platform
about.hero_desc: Judo-Arena is a comprehensive solution for running judo competitions in full compliance with the International Judo Federation (IJF) rules.
about.tech_realtime_desc: WebSocket connections ensure instant result updates across all devices.
about.tech_db_desc: PostgreSQL + Redis. All data is protected, events are written to AuditLog.
about.tech_security_desc: JWT authentication, RBAC, bcrypt hashing, Zod validation on every request.
about.tech_stack_desc: TypeScript, React, Fastify, Prisma. Clean code built to grow.
about.contact_desc: For partnership, questions or a new tournament — get in touch.

athlete_onboarding.subtitle: Athlete Setup
athlete_onboarding.description: To open your dashboard, submit a club request and fill in your sports details.
athlete_onboarding.club_desc: An athlete can only belong to one club.
athlete_onboarding.profile_desc: Phone is optional. Age, gender and weight are required for competitions.
athlete_onboarding.profile_required_error: Date of birth, gender and weight are required

coach_rules.required_hint: To submit the application, confirm the competition rules and coach responsibility.
coach_rules.warning: Violating any of the rules above may result in a permanent ban from the Judo-Arena system.
coach_rules.rule1_title: I do not challenge referee decisions
coach_rules.rule1_text: During and after the competition I will not publicly or privately criticise referees, raise my voice, or protest verbally. Appeals must be submitted in official written form only.
coach_rules.rule2_title: I maintain silence at the tatami
coach_rules.rule2_text: During a bout it is forbidden to shout instructions, use offensive language, or step onto the tatami edge. Violating this rule may result in my club being disqualified from the event.
coach_rules.rule3_title: I do not illegally influence results
coach_rules.rule3_text: I will not attempt to alter the protocol, bracket, or scores through fraud or bribery. If discovered, the club and coach will be permanently disqualified.
coach_rules.rule4_title: I am responsible for my club's athletes
coach_rules.rule4_text: I accept personal responsibility for the conduct, discipline, ethics, and competition readiness (medical clearance, weight, age) of all athletes from my club.
coach_rules.rule5_title: I confirm the accuracy of medical and weight data
coach_rules.rule5_text: I confirm that the medical clearance, date of birth, weight, and gender of each athlete in the application are correct. False data may result in all results being annulled.
coach_rules.rule6_text: I ensure the safety of the competition venue, equipment, tatami, and infrastructure. In the event of damage, the club is liable and must compensate for actual losses.
coach_rules.rule7_text: Violating any of the above rules is grounds for the coach's temporary or permanent suspension from competitions and the club's removal from the rankings.

coach_onboarding.subtitle: Coach Setup
coach_onboarding.description: To open your coach dashboard, join a club and accept the rules.
coach_onboarding.step_club_hint: Submit a request to join a club
coach_onboarding.club_desc: Join an existing club or create a new one.
coach_onboarding.search_hint: Type a club name to search
coach_onboarding.modal_intro: By registering on the Judo-Arena platform, you commit to the following:
coach_onboarding.rule_1: I will maintain respectful behaviour towards all participants near the tatami during competitions.
coach_onboarding.rule_2: I will not raise my voice or insult referees, software, or other coaches/athletes.
coach_onboarding.rule_3: I will not attempt to alter competition protocols or improperly influence results.
coach_onboarding.rule_4: I am responsible for ensuring my club's athletes maintain proper discipline and ethics at competitions.
coach_onboarding.rule_5: I understand that in case of a violation, the Judo-Arena administration has the right to temporarily or permanently block my account.
coach_onboarding.modal_warning: Violations may result in coaches losing the ability to register for tournaments and appeal results.
coach_onboarding.modal_agree_label: I have read all the rules and commit to following them.
